channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ashton Jeanty confirms departure from Boise State after this season
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Boise State running back and Heisman Trophy candidate Ashton Jeanty confirmed Thursday that this will be his last season at the university.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Luis Severino and Athletics agree to $67 million, 3-year contract, AP sources say
item.description: Right-hander Luis Severino and the Athletics have agreed to a $67 million, three-year contract, two people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The people spoke on condition of anonymity Thursday because the agreement had not yet been announced by the team.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California chiropractor defends entering man in women's surf contest to protest transgender athletes
item.description: A California chiropractor who entered a man into a women's surfing contest to protest transgender inclusion defended her stunt amid backlash.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: North Carolina interviews Bill Belichick for head coaching job, AP sources say
item.description: North Carolina has interviewed former New England Patriots coach and six-time Super Bowl champion Bill Belichick for its head coaching position, two people with knowledge of the situation said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Former ESPN star Adrian Wojnarowski eyed by Harris campaign to announce Tim Walz VP pick: report
item.description: The Harris campaign reportedly wanted former ESPN star Adrian Wojnarowski to break the news that Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz would be added to the Democratic ticket alongside Harris.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jack Eichel says Team USA seeks to prove it has closed the gap on Canada at 4 Nations Face-Off
item.description: It didn’t take much to stir Jack Eichel’s national pride in looking ahead to representing the United States at the 4 Nations Face-Off tournament. Appearing on a Team USA Zoom call on Thursday, the Vegas Golden Knights forward jumped right in when reminded how U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears interim head coach has lost over 20 pounds amid team's coaching staff changes
item.description: Chicago Bears interim head coach Thomas Brown received two promotions due to firings last month, and the added responsibilities have helped him lose 22 pounds.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says it 'ridiculous' to believe he has more to prove, still hopes to return to Jets next year
item.description: While Aaron Rodgers remains interested in a future with the Jets, it is unclear if the franchise has mutual feelings about the relationship continuing in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Olivia Dunne seemingly takes shot at social media rival amid Sabrina Carpenter-Barry Keoghan breakup rumors
item.description: LSU gymnast Olivia Dunne seemingly took a shot at social media influencer Breckie Hill as the model had been linked to the reported Sabrina Carpenter-Barry Keoghan breakup.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: St. Pete City Council votes in favor of bond purchase to pay for Rays stadium
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council voted Thursday in favor of purchasing bonds that would fund a portion of the new Rays stadium and the redevelopment of the Gas Plant District.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: League upholds 3-game suspension for Houston LB Azeez Al-Shaair following hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NFL and the NFL players association upheld Houston linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair's three-game suspension without pay for repeated violations of player safety rules following his violent hit to the head of Jacksonville’s Trevor Lawrence, who sustained a concussion and is now on injur
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says it's 'ridiculous' to think he needs the final 5 games to prove his value to Jets
item.description: Aaron Rodgers figures his football resume speaks for itself. So the New York Jets' quarterback doesn't feel the need to use the final stretch of this season to prove his value to the team and that he should be back next season. In fact, it's a notion the four-time NFL MVP finds “ridiculous.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Providence College AD apologizes for offensive religious chant toward BYU basketball team
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4) -- The athletic director at Providence College -- an East Coast catholic university -- apologized to Brigham Young University on social media for offensive chants made by the student section during Tuesday's men's basketball game.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, ABC 4

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jill Ellis steps down from club president position with San Diego Wave FC
item.description: Jill Ellis, club president of the San Diego Wave FC, will be stepping down from her role with the team, the club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Cougars go cold in 83-64 loss at Providence
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team suffered its worst shooting performance of the season and lost at Providence Tuesday night, 83-64 to fall to 6-2 on the season. The Cougars shot just 33.3 percent from the field in scoring a season-low 64 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lincoln's big win, two-way tie lead exciting Gala Awards
item.description: An incredible year for Lincoln quarterback Akili Smith Jr. continued inside the Rock Church Tuesday when he became the second Hornet to win the Silver Pigskin trophy in its 26-year history.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: A Rays move to Ybor City could still be possible
item.description: For months, the Tampa Bay Rays celebrated the signing of a deal between their group, the city of St. Petersburg, and the Pinellas County Commission.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Michigan seeking to play Northwestern at Soldier Field in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — College football season is over for Northwestern University, but that hasn't stopped higher-ups in the administration from weighing venue options for one of its high profile matchups in 2025. According to rg.org's Paul M.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil season games, home opener
item.description: (KRON) – The newest Bay Area major pro sports team, the Golden State Valkyries, has announced the date of its inaugural season at the Chase Center on Monday. The inaugural game, slated for May 16 of next year, will be a California battle with the Valkyries facing the Los Angeles Sparks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's season 'potentially' over after knee injury in 49ers' loss to Bills
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CU Buffs await bowl selection
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Buffaloes won't be heading to the Big 12 title game, but they're still sitting comfortably in the AP Top 25 at No. 20. With nine wins, including seven in conference play, it's a season most Buffs fans would call a success. Now, it's a waiting game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: McLaughlin's field goal in OT helps Bucs beat Panthers 26-23, move into 1st-place tie in NFC South
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers beat the Carolina Panthers 26-23 in overtime on a 30-yard field goal by Chase McLaughlin on Sunday to move into a tie for first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mitchell scores 35, Cavs end Celtics' winning streak with 115-111 win in matchup of East's elite
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 20 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter as the Cleveland Cavaliers ended Boston's seven-game winning streak with a 115-111 victory over the Celtics on Sunday night in the second intense matchup between the Eastern Conference’s top teams this season.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5
